game_name: The Mafat Conspiracy: Golgo 13 Part II

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic combat threat in scrolling segments
Boss-like encounters with Arm of Mafat, Bodyguard, Canine
Increased enemy variety and attack patterns
Vehicle-based combat with FSB agents, gear management
Complex enemy encounters with varied arsenals
Night vision utility for maze navigation

typical_relief_triggers: Successful enemy defeats in stationary segments
Information briefings from CIA agents James and Sylvia
typical_tension_triggers: Entry into horizontally scrolling stages with multiple armed enemies
Encounter with stationary boss-like named enemies
Ferrari action segment with FSB agents
Maze navigation with varied enemy types
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic intensity cycling through five distinct screen types; each type presents discrete challenge phases separated by information delivery and weapon acquisition

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic platforming and pistol-armed enemy encounters; emphasis on movement mastery
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of machine guns, melee combat arenas, environmental hazards, and vehicle sequences; escalating enemy variety
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex maze navigation with multi-armed enemy types and precision sniper segments; mission-critical objectives (freeing Dr. Barrows, eliminating Mafat leader)
notable_spikes: First stationary arena fight (Arm of Mafat encounter)
3D maze segments with multiple enemy types

notable_level_patterns.description: Timed horizontal scroll with varied armed enemies (pistols, machine guns, grenades, melee) and animal threats; ammo and health scattered as pickups
Confined space melee encounter with named antagonists (Arm of Mafat, Bodyguard, Canine); pure punch/kick combat
Ferrari-based driving segment with gear changes and grenade throws at FSB agent vehicles; pseudo-3D perspective
First-person or isometric maze navigation with pistol, grenade-throwing, and machine gun enemies; infrared scope as optional power-up
Static sniper rifle aiming view with wind direction/speed calculation; background close-up of target site; mission-critical eliminations
